code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = "#{io.read_to_end()} "
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            if not list.contains(nums, v)
              nums = list.push(nums, v)
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  let len = nums.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < len
    match nums.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
      mut inserted = false
      mut j = 0
      let slen = sorted.len()
      while j < slen
        match sorted.get(j)
        when Some(u)
          if not inserted and v < u
            new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
            inserted = true
          end
          new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, u)
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if not inserted
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
      end
      sorted = new_sorted
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut m = 0
  let slen2 = sorted.len()
  while m < slen2
    match sorted.get(m)
    when Some(v)
      if m == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
